ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated for the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., in_progress, completed, delayed) */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phases" (
  "phase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phase */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the phase belongs to */,
  "phase_name" TEXT /* Name of the phase */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the phase */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the phase */,
  "phase_status" TEXT /* Current status of the phase (e.g., not_started, in_progress, completed) */,
  "phase_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the phase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_phases_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_allocations" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding allocation */,
  "phase_id" INTEGER /* ID of the phase the allocation belongs to */,
  "released_amount" REAL /* Amount of funds released for the phase */,
  "utilized_amount" REAL /* Amount of funds utilized for the phase */,
  "receivable_amount" REAL /* Amount of funds receivable for the phase */,
  "allocated_date" TEXT /* Date when the funds were allocated */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the allocation was updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the funding allocation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_allocations_phase_id FOREIGN KEY ("phase_id") REFERENCES phases ("phase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the funding allocation the invoice belongs to */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was generated */,
  "invoice_amount" REAL /* Amount of the invoice */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the invoice (e.g., pending, paid, overdue) */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Date by which the invoice should be paid */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms (e.g., net 30, net 60) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the invoice */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_allocation_id FOREIGN KEY ("allocation_id") REFERENCES funding_allocations ("allocation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the invoice the payment belongs to */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., bank transfer, check) */,
  "payment_reference" TEXT /* Reference number or description for the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., project manager, financial analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date and time the user logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_projects" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the user is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission associated with the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., login, logout, update) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log entry */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user performing the action */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the notification is for */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., alert, reminder) */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Read status of the notification (e.g., read, unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the changes */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the audit entry */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Changes made (e.g., before, after) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user performing the action */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the report belongs to */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data of the report (e.g., JSON, CSV) */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., financial, progress) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the report was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
